horoscope: Mercury’s retrograde in your home sector these days can point to past problems resurfacing for review, dear Aries. It's a good time to revise plans and rework old projects. However, today's New Moon occurs in the same sector of your solar chart, stirring a burst of energy and motivation to take charge of home and family matters. There is a strong focus on improvements to these areas of your life now and in the coming week. You may be especially focused on reorganizing or even remodeling your home, routines, and home environment. The major focus with family can be on looking to the past to improve the present and the future. This New Moon reminds you that your home is your base, and it's important to treat it as such. Working on it first can help other areas of life blossom. Feelings can emerge that spur you to find new ways to express yourself, or you might break free from the past in some way, particularly on emotional levels. You might put situations that have been holding you back behind you.

This morning, a New Moon occurs in your solar third house, dear Taurus, and this signals a busy time ahead. You have new energy for ideas, making valuable and happy connections, and improving your skills. Your curiosity is at a peak, and your desire to express yourself and communicate with others is also strong. It's a good time to write and step up courses, projects, and interests. New avenues for communicating or getting around can open for you. How you organize your daily life and divide your attention are called into question, and a reworking of these things may be in order. It's time to put out feelers, take in new ideas and information, and be open to the need for more intellectual stimulation. However, watch for taking on so many activities or commitments that you feel overwhelmed. Consider that with Mercury still retrograde in this same area of your chart, important information may be missed or missing. You’re filled with ideas now, and it’s a little too soon to know which ones will take and which ideas will be left behind. However, there is no need to worry about the difference between the two yet. Instead, aim to enjoy the process and don’t push yourself.

With Mercury retrograde in your resources sector these days, dear Gemini, there may be a need to review your finances or budget, and you could be dealing with lost or misplaced possessions. You might discover hidden resources in the process. The New Moon today occurs in the same sector, bringing wonderful energy and motivation to improve your finances and attend to your personal possessions in the week ahead. Ideas, particularly money-making ones, come to you in flashes. Receive and enjoy them, and sort them out patiently as you go along. Look for hidden gems in the projects you already have in place. Opportunities to improve your business or get back on a more productive schedule can emerge. You might decide to give someone, an old project, or a situation another look or the benefit of the doubt. If you do end up reviving something, it requires a new approach. New Moons give us a shot of motivation and take-charge energy, and this one affects your finances, earning and spending power, sense of self-worth and value, and needs for comfort and security. All that makes you feel secure, safe, and comfortable comes under the rule of the solar second house.

Today's New Moon occurs in your sign, dear Cancer, and is a high point for you. In fact, you may be able to ride on its waves for several weeks. Even so, you can feel a little in the dark as it happens, and it's best to take your time receiving its message, after which it's a time for personal reinvention. Set your intentions on the New Moon but give it a bit of time before launching a new project, enterprise, or look. Renewal, coming out of the background, getting attention, making decisions, things moving forward -- these are all strong themes from now on. You're seizing the moment and making an impression! Energy comes your way to make important improvements in your life if you choose to harness it. If you're itching for a change in how others view and receive you, this is a good time for a personal makeover of sorts. Even so, with Mercury retrograde in your sign, it's a time for looking to the past for answers as well as for refining projects. Keep in mind that what you communicate today has more impact than usual.

A New Moon occurs in your solar twelfth house today, dear Leo, and the focus is on your private life. The urge to find emotional peace of mind will be apparent, whether this comes naturally to you or circumstances push you in this direction. This energy can ultimately lead you to take action on revelations about the past. A reminder not to jump in too quickly may not be necessary, since you may naturally feel a little hesitant right now. Take the time to sort out your thoughts. This New Moon brings you new energy for dealing with matters of the past, and you can be motivated to put some things behind you or to put some things to rest. Listen attentively to your intuition and your dreams. Certainly, buried or neglected issues can demand your attention, and you can be especially sensitive psychically. Try not to overthink things and stick to the simple now.

Today's New Moon brings a boost of new energy to your life, dear Virgo, in the areas of friendships, group associations, humanitarian goals, and the pursuit of happiness. New friendships are among the most prominent results of this lunation, but other notable events include breathing new life into existing connections or setting new goals, dreams, and plans to look forward to and enjoy. You're looking at people and your "place" with or amongst them in a new light. You might also revive a project that's dear to your heart in the coming weeks. With retrograde Mercury in this same area of your solar chart, this is a strong time for reconsidering and refining, and ultimately improving, projects and associations. Old friendships can re-emerge, and memories or surprise meetings can change your perspective.

Today's New Moon brings energy that feels fresh and new to your career goals, responsibilities, and life direction, dear Libra. Because Mercury is retrograde in the same sector, you have both forward and backward vision, allowing you to really see where you’re coming from and where you’d like to head on the level of your career or life path. It's a time to make important tweaks that improve your professional and public life. You have more impact on others than usual, so make the most of this time in the spotlight. Clarify your actions if you feel the need, as they can be misinterpreted quite easily right now. Even so, an air of mystery may very well work in your favor. There may be new responsibilities, recognition, or a new position or project ahead of you.

With the New Moon occurring in your adventure sector today, dear Scorpio, you’ll be very focused on expanding your experience and deepening your understanding of your life’s purpose in the days ahead. Because Mercury is retrograde in this same sector, you now have both forward- and backward-looking energy with you. Enjoy activities or projects that feed your thirst for out-of-the-ordinary experiences. Events these days can bring a sudden urge to experience life beyond the routine through travel, adventure, or further education. Certainly, inner restlessness is stirring, but the conviction to do something about it should also emerge, and it can be a strong, motivating force. You may be creating new from something or seeing new layers of a situation you previously overlooked. Some compelling interests and beliefs can emerge now.

Today's New Moon is motivating, dear Sagittarius, and it can open doors to you when it comes to following a passion. This lunation may stir up a keen interest in learning about your own needs, motivations, and deeper desires, and empower you to make important lifestyle or psychological changes. You may be seeking more passion and intensity in a relationship or a project, or you might recognize your inner strength and feel more powerful and effective in bringing needed changes to your life. You might want to take charge of a matter in which you feel indebted to someone or something. Retrograde Mercury continues to transit this area of your solar chart, bringing a need to review your financial commitments and shared resources. Your insight into what aspects of yourself you need to transform is compelling now.

Today’s New Moon energizes a need to start fresh in a partnership or with a relationship, dear Capricorn. With Mercury retrograde in the same area of your solar chart, this is a good time to resolve to approach partnerships in a new way. Your vision for your relationship needs is spectacular now. The desire or need to cooperate and merge with others is strong. Starting fresh in a relationship can involve donning a new attitude or gathering the courage to make something happen. Seeing both sides of a situation helps round out your thinking, ultimately leading to better decisions. Counseling and advice can be in focus and helpful. Instead, this can be a time to arrive at meaningful realizations about your relationship needs through the events of this time in your life. Take in now, and take action when it feels right.

Retrograde Mercury in your work and health sector points to some backtracking surrounding health, work, and daily routines, dear Aquarius. Still, today's New Moon occurs in the same sector of your solar chart, bringing a sense that you’re beginning anew in these areas. While you’re looking back on these matters, you’re also looking forward, which affords you an unusual and compelling vision of work, health, and self-care programs. Energy and motivation to refine a health or fitness regimen, reorganize your home or workspace from top to bottom, or delve into an old work project are strong, and it’s an excellent time to edit and improve. Improved daily routines help you in many areas of life, and it’s a good idea to consider ways to tweak current projects and ideas rather than start all-new ones. The desire to take better care of yourself and/or to do your personal best can be strong.

With Mercury retrograde in your solar fifth house these days, dear Pisces, the creative process can sometimes feel as if it’s moving backward or slowed down, when in fact, it’s more about going through a realignment process. You are thinking and expressing yourself in different ways. The New Moon occurring today in the same sector of your solar chart can act as a push forward. You are in a unique position to look both behind you and ahead to what you want to accomplish, particularly with recreation, hobbies, romance, and creative pursuits. It’s possible that an old project or an old flame can reemerge into your life or your consciousness. The urge to express yourself in special, unique ways is powerful, and the desire for positive feedback or admiration is perhaps as strong. Further information or an epiphany about a creative or romantic matter can figure strongly. New methods or solutions can emerge from a review of the past, and they can be very important in the weeks ahead. It's a strong time for creating, romancing, enjoying, and entertaining.
